title: What is AI?
description: Your gateway to the world of artificial intelligence

scenes.speech: Let's explore the world of AI with Garuchan!
scenes.title: What is AI?

scenes.speech: AI is computer technology that mimics the human brain!
scenes.title: What is Artificial Intelligence?
scenes.content: AI (Artificial Intelligence) is technology that lets computers think and learn like humans. It's used in smartphones, cars, games, and much more!

scenes.speech: AI history started back in the 1950s!
scenes.title: History of AI
scenes.content: The term 'Artificial Intelligence' was coined in 1956. Since then, it has gone through many booms and winters. Today's AI is smarter than ever!

scenes.speech: There are many different kinds of AI!
scenes.title: Types of AI
scenes.content: Narrow AI (good at specific tasks) vs General AI (good at everything). Most current AI is narrow AI, but it beats humans at specific tasks!

scenes.speech: AI learns from massive amounts of data!
scenes.title: How Does AI Learn?
scenes.content: AI learns just like a baby — by seeing lots of examples. Show it 100 million photos and it can tell cats from dogs!

scenes.speech: AI is already all around you!
scenes.title: AI Around You
scenes.content: Siri, Google Translate, Netflix recommendations, self-driving cars... they all use AI! You might be using AI every single day!

scenes.speech: There are things AI is incredibly good at!
scenes.title: What AI is Good At
scenes.content: Image recognition, translation, speech recognition, chess, and Go — AI beats world champions. AI excels at repetitive and pattern-based tasks!

scenes.title: What AI Struggles With
scenes.content: Understanding emotions, handling unexpected situations, and common sense reasoning are still hard for AI. Humans and AI make the best team!

scenes.speech: Let's imagine how AI will change the world!
scenes.title: AI and the Future
scenes.content: Medicine, education, environment... AI might solve humanity's biggest challenges. You could be a future leader who uses AI!

scenes.speech: You've mastered the basics of AI! Keep going!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
